commit.subject: LU-14094 tests: give zfs more wait time again to unlink
commit.message:
LU-14094 tests: give zfs more wait time again to unlink

In sanity.sh test_311, give zfs more wait time to unlink more
files as expected.

Test-Parameters: trivial fstype=zfs testlist=sanity env=ONLY=311,ONLY_REPEAT=200
